title: Adopt mattpocock/skills methodology: vendor 4 standalone skills (diagnose, zoom-out, prototype, adv-skill-author), introduce CONTEXT.md + docs/adr/ as ADV-consumed artifacts, refactor existing adv-* skills to progressive-disclosure authoring, exclude overlap skills.

tasks.title: **P1: Sync extension (ADR-002).** Modify `scripts/sync-global.sh:1322-1338` skill-copy block from single-file (`cp $skill_file $dest_dir/SKILL.md`) to whole-directory (`cp -R $skill_dir/* $dest_dir/`). Verify behavior unchanged for existing single-file skills via `--dry-run --diff` snapshot before/after. Write `docs/adr/0002-skill-sync-whole-directory.md` recording the decision per the ADR rubric (hard-to-reverse: medium; surprising-without-context: yes; result-of-real-tradeoff: yes). AC: AC1, AC7.
tasks.verification: pnpm run check passes (typecheck + lint + format:check). Sync dry-run before/after diff: zero output difference for existing 15 single-file skills (backward compatible). Multi-file fixture test in /tmp confirmed: SKILL.md + sibling REFERENCE.md + scripts/helper.sh all copied with directory structure preserved. ADR-002 written with rubric verification (hard-to-reverse: medium; surprising-without-context: yes; result-of-real-tradeoff: yes — all 3 criteria met).

tasks.title: **P3.1: domain-context capability spec.** Author `.adv/specs/domain-context/spec.json` with two requirements: `rq-domainContext01` (CONTEXT.md format + consumers: /adv-discover MAY read, /adv-design MAY append, /adv-clarify MAY read) and `rq-domainContextADR01` (docs/adr/NNNN-slug.md format, ADR-sparingly 3-criteria rubric, consumer /adv-design MAY emit when met). Both priority `should`. Verify via `adv_spec list` returns capability with 2 requirements. AC: AC2.
tasks.verification: Spec authored at .adv/specs/domain-context/spec.json with 2 should-priority requirements (rq-domainContext01, rq-domainContextADR01). Structurally valid JSON with $schema, name, title, purpose, version, updated_at, requirements (each with id/title/body/priority/scenarios). Citation markers added for both requirements per P25 related-scan (rq-domainContext01 in ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md Skill Discovery Protocol section as placeholder; rq-domainContextADR01 in .opencode/command/adv-design.md Phase 2 as placeholder — both will be expanded properly in P5/P6 tasks). Bundled fix: updated 2 test assertions (sync-global.test.ts:124, adv-tron-assets.test.ts:33) to match new whole-directory copy pattern from P1 — closes the P1 TDD gap where literal cp string assertion was missed in red phase. Spec-citation invariant test now passes (was failing for both new requirements). 3 of 4 prior failures resolved. Remaining 1 failure (overlay-sync-assets.test.ts opencode-unavailable runtime canary) is pre-existing on trunk — confirmed via test run from main checkout.

tasks.title: **P7: Verification.** Full verification sweep: (1) `pnpm run check` (typecheck + lint + format:check) from `plugin/` — must pass; (2) `pnpm test` from `plugin/` — must pass with no regression; (3) `./scripts/sync-global.sh --dry-run --diff` — must show new vendored skills (adv-diagnose with scripts/, adv-zoom-out, adv-prototype with LOGIC.md/UI.md, adv-skill-author) and updated existing skills (5 split skills with new sibling docs) sync correctly; (4) `adv_change_validate adoptMattpocockSkills` — must pass spec compliance against existing + new specs; (5) per-skill reference integrity audit: grep for old skill content moved to sibling docs and verify references resolve. AC: AC7.
tasks.verification: pnpm run check passed. Targeted regression suite passed: adv-skill-backed-commands-assets, adv-slop-scan-assets, adv-tron-assets, domain-context-assets, sync-global (127 tests). sync-global dry-run now shows 19 worktree-local skills synced, including new vendored skills and sibling docs. adv_change_validate passed with NO_DELTAS warning only. Per-skill sibling-file integrity audit passed. Full pnpm test still fails only known pre-existing overlay-sync-assets runtime canary; same exact test fails on main checkout.

wisdom.content: For targeted Vitest in plugin, prefer `pnpm exec vitest run <path>` over `pnpm test -- <path>`; the latter may still exercise broader configured suites and surface unrelated known failures.

proposal.approval_evidence: Proposal phase complete. Two MEDIUM ambiguities open (non-blocking, below HIGH≥2 / CRITICAL≥1 trigger). Clarify-readiness scanner flagged 2 advisory warnings (no Scope section, no error-handling section) — to be resolved during discovery current-state work.
